strengths: Direct experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq
Strong distributed-systems background with real-time, low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby)
Proven ability to scale engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) in high-growth environments
concerns: Limited explicit fintech domain experience (credit risk, working-capital management, or embedded finance)
No direct evidence of leading large-scale multi-agent AI system architecture in production
Short tenure (6 months) at re:cinq with no prior CTO or VP Engineering roles listed
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed-systems and backend engineering skills, including real-time low-latency systems and AI-agent tooling contributions. However, his fintech-specific experience is minimal, and there is limited evidence of leading large-scale multi-agent AI systems or executive-level fintech architecture. His recent roles show rapid career movement, which may raise questions about depth of strategic impact.
